content.en:
Time is long.

Ye Tian's breakthrough soon reached a critical moment, and the Dragon Gu Lord was very nervous, for fear that a strong person would interrupt Ye Tian's breakthrough.

The most calm nature is Ye Tian himself, he is not nervous at all.

"Everyone, pay attention, to prevent the Star Lord from sending clones to cause trouble!"

Lord Longgu reminded everyone.

However, all the while, the Star Lord did not appear.

They didn't even know that the Star Lord had been frightened, and they were afraid that it would be difficult to see the Star Lord for a long time.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian began to completely melt into time and became a legendary realm lord who was incarnated by time.

The breakthrough has officially begun!

The endless power of time poured into Ye Tian's body, prompting his body to complete its final transformation

His supreme legendary body broke through, and the will realm "One Five Seven" broke through, breaking through from the sixth-order peak Eternal Will to the seventh-order Eternal Will, and constantly improving in the seventh-order Eternal Will, and the ascension was incomparably fast.

Soon, the breakthrough was completed.

At this time, Ye Tian's body was filled with the aura of a Legendary Realm Lord.

"Finally a breakthrough!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

The Legendary Realm Lord Realm, this is the realm he has always dreamed of, and now he has really broken through.

Moreover, for a period of time after the breakthrough, his comprehension is in an extremely active and increased stage, and if he comprehends something in this stage of enlightenment, the speed will be much faster.

So, after Ye Tian thanked these Legendary Realm Lords, he immediately came to the Three Thousand Iris and began to retreat and cultivate, one is to stabilize the realm, and the other is to comprehend the fourth amplification class time supreme technique.

Originally, he wanted to go to enlightenment before the Legendary Realm Lord, but when he became a half-step Legendary Realm Lord first, he became the Legendary Realm Lord first.

However, he himself was about to create the fourth Time Supreme Technique, and after breaking through at this moment, he would definitely be able to create the Fourth Time Supreme Technique soon.

Sure enough, it didn't take long for the fourth time supreme technique to be created.

"Time Realm!"

Ye Tian gave this time supreme technique such a name.

The Time Domain Realm is a special realm world, which can increase one's own combat power, increase other time supreme skills, and also have a certain binding effect.

After some more years, Ye Tiancai truly stabilized the Legendary Realm Lord Realm.

"The lord of Xuan Xuan, the eternal will of the late seventh order, the supreme legend is small, and the four doors of time are the supreme skill. "

It is the strength that Ye Tian has now.

If the supreme legend body reaches the realm of legends, the lord is Xiaocheng, if it reaches the peak of the realm of legends and lords, then the supreme legend realm is Dacheng, and if it becomes the eternal master, it is the real consummation.

And the Eternal Will of the late seventh order is almost the ultimate of most Legendary Realm Lords, it is extremely difficult to advance to the Eighth Order, this is a huge shackle, even the peak Legendary Realm Lord, may not be able to raise the Eternal Will to the Eighth Order.

And the will of the Eternal Master is the true Eighth Order or even the Ninth Order.

It can be said that when you reach the realm of the Legendary Realm Lord, almost no one has improved the Eternal Will, because it is too difficult, and it cannot be improved at all.

Basically, after breaking through to the Legendary Realm Lord, what level of will will be raised is almost like this, it is extremely difficult to go further, and it is almost impossible to find treasures that can enhance the will of the Legendary Realm Lord in the Void Area, and there are no secret techniques that can enhance the will of the Legendary Realm Lord.

"It's a pity, I thought I could reach the peak of the seventh order Eternal Will!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, to this extent, he is already very satisfied.

For the lords of the Legendary Realm, it is difficult to improve their will, and the most important thing is to create supreme skills, as well as to comprehend time or space.

Ye Tian has already controlled time, his next step is to control the space, if he can control the space, he will break through to the peak Legendary Realm Lord realm.

However, as the Lord of the Time Legend Realm, it was too difficult for him to control the space.

Ye Tian had also tried to comprehend the space, but a force in the dark prevented him from going to the comprehension space, so it was difficult to comprehend anything.

After stabilizing the realm, he created the fourth time supreme technique, and Ye Tian communicated with several Legendary Realm lords.

He has only now broken through to the Legendary Realm Lord Realm, and his understanding of the level of Legendary Realm Lords is only very one-sided, so it is easy to know the future cultivation route by trading with these Legendary Realm Lords.

On this day, several Legendary Realm Lords communicated together.

"Endless Lord, I'm afraid your current strength has surpassed us!"

Lord Dragongu said0........

"Where, I've just broken through to the Legendary Realm Lord Realm!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

Immediately, Ye Tian asked, "Everyone, after breaking through to the Legendary Realm Lord, can you only improve your strength by creating supreme skills and comprehension space?"

The Dragon Gu Lord said: "That's not the case, the legendary power of the Legendary Realm Lord is almost endless, and it can even extract power from the Long River of Time or the empty sea, so there is no problem of improving cultivation." The Eternal Will is also difficult to improve, and the Legendary Body is almost impossible to improve, for the average Legendary Realm Lord, there is indeed only one way to create supreme skills. However, if you really want to improve your strength, this is not the only way. The Legendary Realm Lord controls time and space, which is the peak Legendary Realm Lord, time and space are fused, and it is the eternal master of billions, but the Endless Lord You should feel it, we want space. However, the path is infinite, time and space are only the most fundamental sources, and if the eternal path derived from time and space is controlled, such as the way of water, the way of fire, the way of earth, and so on, the hope of mastering space can be increased. "

"That's true, for example, I'm trying to control the way of ice now, if I can completely control the way of ice, I can increase my strength a little bit, and I can also realize the time faster, then there will be fewer obstacles in the dark. Lord Frostless said.

"I'm afraid it's difficult to control other Dao, right?" Ye Tian asked.

The Dragon Gu Lord nodded, "It's really difficult, but it's many times easier than controlling the space, it is rumored that there is one who controls the Legendary Realm Lord level, controls many paths, and finally controls the space easily, and because he controls many paths, it is also much easier than other peak Legendary Realm Lords in terms of space and time fusion." "

"I see, thank you for the experience of the lords!"

Ye Tian thanked.

At this time, Lord Longgu proposed: "Endless Lord, I am afraid that your strength has surpassed me now, but I still want to fight with you, I don't know if it is okay?"

"Okay!"

Ye Tian nodded, he also wanted to know how his strength was now. _
